title: Skyline Gondola & Luge Queenstown
meta_desc: Review of Skyline Gondola & Luge in Queenstown, NZ. Prices, age suitability, and insider tips for families. Learn how to book and save money.
intro: The Skyline Gondola & Luge in Queenstown is a must-do activity for families. With panoramic views of Queenstown and Lake Wakatipu, it's an unforgettable experience. But what's it really like with kids?

sections.heading: What to Expect
sections.body:
Taking the gondola up Bob's Peak is an exciting experience for kids, with breathtaking views of Queenstown and Lake Wakatipu. The luge ride down is a thrilling adventure that kids will love, and they can ride solo from age 3. The restaurant at the top offers good value for lunch, with a range of options to suit all tastes.

The activity is suitable for kids aged 3+, and the staff are friendly and helpful. The duration of the activity is around 2-4 hours, depending on how much time you spend at the top.

However, be aware that the gondola ride can be a bit scary for very young children, and the luge ride can be intimidating for some kids. But overall, it's a great activity for families with kids who love adventure and the outdoors.

sections.heading: Value for Money
sections.body:
The price of the Skyline Gondola & Luge is $50 per adult and $35 per child. While it may seem a bit pricey, the experience is well worth the cost. The views from the top are stunning, and the luge ride is a unique and exciting experience that kids will love.

However, if you're on a tight budget, you may want to consider visiting during the off-season or looking for package deals that include other activities.

sections.heading: Insider Tips
sections.body:
To make the most of your visit, it's a good idea to book in advance, especially during peak season. You can book online or at the Skyline Gondola terminal.

It's also a good idea to wear warm clothing, as it can get chilly at the top, even in summer. And don't forget to bring your camera, as the views are truly stunning.
list: Book in advance to avoid queues

sections.heading: Best Time to Visit
sections.body: The best time to visit the Skyline Gondola & Luge is during the summer months, when the weather is warm and sunny. However, if you're looking for a more relaxed experience, consider visiting during the off-season, when the crowds are smaller.

sections.heading: How to Book and Save Money
sections.body:
To book the Skyline Gondola & Luge, simply visit the official website or visit the terminal in person. You can also book through a tour operator or travel agent.

To save money, consider visiting during the off-season or looking for package deals that include other activities. You can also save money by booking online in advance.
